item.title: Anushka GC Portfolio
item.description:
Welcome to Anushka GC’s Portfolio

Hello, this is Anushka GC’s portfolio website.

This website is created to present academic work, projects, skills, and personal achievements in a simple and professional way.

About

Anushka GC is a student who is building knowledge and practical skills in computing, web development, and digital technologies.

Skills

  • HTML
  • CSS
  • JavaScript
  • Git and GitHub
  • Hugo Static Site Generator

Projects

This portfolio will include class tasks, coursework, and personal practice projects.
